entries: she ended it. four years and she ended it for my friend. actually insane.
not gonna lie i did not see that coming. i thought we were solid. guess not.
deleted his number. do not really want to talk about it.
people keep checking on me and i keep saying im fine. easier that way.
met someone. not looking for anything just happened. she seems cool.
been texting her everyday. set an alarm so i catch her before she wakes up lol. kinda wild that i do that but whatever.
she made a joke and said i should do something and i just did it. she thought it was funny. i thought it was funny too. no biggie.
okay i think i actually like her. not gonna make it weird tho.
she mentioned some guy today. probably nothing.
she only texts first when things are probably slow on her end. i notice but i reply anyway.
bro i am literally the backup option. i know this. i am still here.
four years and a backstab and now this. i really said let me find the one situation that could finish me off.
she said i love you today. i said it back. i do not even know if i meant it or if i just wanted her to feel what i felt for her at the start.
i think i was doing all that stuff hoping it would make her actually choose me. the alarms the jokes doing whatever she said. none of that was really me. i just wanted her to feel something real.
whatever. i am good. moving on.
